details.test: Task 1: Enroll in cheapest 8-week beginner evening acting class next month under $400
Task 2: Book 60-minute on-camera coaching on a Friday after 4 PM next month
Task 3: Add three different upcoming class sessions to cart (adapted)
Task 4: Buy $150 digital gift card and add to cart
Task 5: Subscribe to audition tips after reading beginner article
Task 6: Save highest-hours acting foundations course under $500 to wishlist (adapted)
Task 7: Create beginner training plan with three classes starting within 45 days (adapted)
Task 8: Register for free introductory acting workshop this month
Task 9: Request consultation with coach from TV/film testimonial
